# In Parallel

> In Parallel gives you a living execution plan that updates itself from your meetings — so what you see is always what's true.

Your plan is probably lying to you. Decisions get made, priorities shift, reality moves. But the tools don't know yet. As long as you update your plan manually, the gap between reality and truth widens. The living execution plan closes that gap automatically, so what you see is always what's true.

Website: https://www.in-parallel.com
Contact: hello@in-parallel.com

---

## Product Overview

In Parallel is a living execution plan that joins your meetings, captures what changes, and keeps every connected tool and plan current — automatically. No manual updates. No chasing. Just a shared picture of what's actually happening.

Save 6-8 hours per manager, every week. Meetings describe what reality is. Right now, nothing else does. In Parallel makes sure your plan does, too.

### How It Works

In Parallel listens to your meetings and captures what changes — decisions, ownership, priorities. It pushes those changes into your plan and your tools automatically. So the plan always reflects what actually happened, not what someone remembered to update.

**1. Before (Pre-meeting)**
Before every meeting, surfaces what's drifted, what's at risk, and what needs a decision. So you walk in informed, not scrambling.

**2. During (In-meeting)**
During the meeting, it listens and captures every decision, ownership change, and commitment in real time, without anyone taking notes.

**3. After (Post-meeting)**
After the meeting, it updates your execution plan, pushes changes to connected tools, and generates a report. You walk out with nothing left to do.

---

## Integrations

No migrations. No new process. Just connection. In Parallel works with whatever your teams are already using — meetings, Slack, email, Jira. No standardisation required first.

- **Microsoft 365 Copilot** — Connect all your work items on Microsoft 365.
- **Microsoft Teams** — Transcribe your calls and chats.
- **Microsoft SharePoint** — Easily attach files to tasks to keep teams and work connected.
- **Microsoft PowerBI** — Access your existing business intelligence and analytics.
- **Microsoft Outlook** — Sync your task and project deadlines to your Outlook calendar.
- **Slack** — Get updates, create and delegate tasks without leaving Slack.
- **Google Workspace** — Connect all your work items on Google Workspace.
- **Google Calendar** — Sync your task and project deadlines to your work calendar.
- **Google Meet** — Transcribe your calls and chats.
- **Linear** — Connect your system for modern software development.
- **Atlassian Jira** — Connect your system for modern software development.
- **HubSpot** — Connect your CRM and marketing intelligence.
- **Salesforce** — Connect your CRM and marketing intelligence.
- **Asana** — Connect your project management workflows.

Don't see yours? In Parallel will add it.

## Pricing

Flexible plans that grow with your organization.

- **Starter** — For small teams getting started. Contact us for pricing.
- **Growth** (Most popular) — For scaling organizations. Contact us for pricing.
- **Enterprise** — Custom deployment and support. Contact us for pricing.

Book a demo: https://www.in-parallel.com/demo

---

## Security & Compliance

Your data never leaves your control. Enterprise-ready out of the box. Deployed in minutes, not months. No AI models are trained on your data. Your information stays where it is.

### Certifications & Standards

- **ISO 27001** — Information security management certified.
- **ISO 42001** — AI management system certified.
- **SOC 2 Type II** — Audited and attested security controls.
- **GDPR Compliant** — Full compliance with EU data protection regulations.

### Enterprise Features

- SSO/SAML/SCIM authentication
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Full audit logs
- Data residency options
- DPIA documentation included as standard

---

## Company

Founded in 2023, In Parallel is based in Helsinki, Finland.

Built by people who've felt this problem firsthand. Our founder spent years watching managers drown in coordination overhead while the actual work waited. In a previous company, he had 24 people whose full-time job was maintaining execution plans. That was the moment we decided to build something better.

**Mission**: Empower organizations and individuals to do the right things right.

**Vision**: Lead a new generation of enterprise software that equips large companies to thrive in the face of complexity and change.

The team are builders with deep experience in enterprise software, product, and go-to-market — focused on compounding learning across large organizations.

**Investors**: Lifeline Ventures, Notion Capital, and a group of private investors.

### Careers

In Parallel is building the next generation of enterprise software from Helsinki, Finland. If you're excited about AI, execution intelligence, and enterprise-scale challenges, reach out at careers@in-parallel.com.

Pre-built management routine templates to accelerate your team's execution. Available at https://www.in-parallel.com/routines. Categories include weekly, monthly, quarterly, and ad-hoc routines.

### White Papers

40% of manager time is spent on coordination overhead, not the actual work. In Parallel has built the research to prove it, and the product to fix it. Available at https://www.in-parallel.com/white-papers.
